action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 2 achieved worst_region_accuracy=0.4196 (overall=0.6161) after only 2 epochs of CLIP ViT-L/14 fine-tuning. Africa is the weakest region (0.42) vs 0.63-0.69 for others. Training loss is still high (~1.3-1.9) suggesting heavy underfitting. Iteration time is ~15-20 min for 2 epochs, so 8 epochs ≈ 1 hour. Analysis: We have massive headroom from longer training and need to specifically improve Africa/generalization. Decision: (1) Train for 8 epochs with cosine LR decay; (2) Add AutoAugment, label smoothing, dropout on the head, and separate LR for backbone vs head; (3) Use region-balanced sampling (WeightedRandomSampler) so each geographic region appears equally often per epoch—this directly targets the worst-region metric; (4) Evaluate val worst_region_accuracy after every epoch and save the best checkpoint; (5) Add simple TTA (horizontal flip ensemble) to predict.py for free robustness gains.
